4001.PoolDesc:
The Renewal Festival is one of the most important annual celebrations in the Asterleeds Region.
In ancient times, people relied solely on celestial phenomena to mark the passage of the year. When a light spot that could pierce through thick fog appeared in the night sky, it was seen as a symbol of the old year ending and the new year beginning.

To welcome the arrival of a new year, the Meowlux Merchant Guild presents the Renewal Festival limited-time Wish event.

※This event requires the use of the special Renewal Light Wish Coin which is only valid during the Renewal Festival. These Wish Coins can be obtained in the Renewal Store using Renewal Seals, or you can spend Rose Orbs x80 to purchase it directly.
※The pity count for this Wish is calculated independently and will not carry over to other Wish events, nor affect their pity counts.
※All rewards obtained from this Wish are bound items.
Limited-time Appearance items under [SSR] cannot be obtained through other means after this event ends.
Limited-time appearance items under [SR] and [R] can also be obtained through exchange in the Renewal Store, in addition to drawing them.

※Duplicate appearance items will automatically convert into a certain number of Renewal Light Vault Cards. Other rewards can be exchanged at the Meowlux Member Shop by handing them to Kalista for additional Renewal Light Vault Cards.
※After the event ends at 05:00 on March 9, 2026 (UTC-2), Kalista will continue to maintain access to the Renewal Store for exchanging for Renewal Light Vault Cards and Renewal Light rewards.
